description_long: This is a rectangular, dark wood chest of drawers featuring a simple, modern design. The front face displays four equally sized drawers arranged in two rows, each fitted with a small, round knob handle. The wood grain is subtly visible, giving the surface a rich, deep brown appearance with a matte to slightly glossy finish. The sides and top are plain, with no additional ornamentation or features, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The chest appears sturdy and solid, likely constructed from hardwood or engineered wood with a veneer finish. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for use in bedrooms, hallways, or even urban garages for organized storage.
description: A dark wood chest of drawers with four drawers and round knob handles, featuring a minimalist, modern design and a rich brown finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with round knob handles, highlighting the main storage and interaction area.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat wooden panel with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, unadorned wooden back panel with a consistent dark finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, featureless wooden surface.
